subcodes.first_line: O heavenly youth and divine being, whatsoever thou didst write and all that thou didst expound hath been noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوان رحمانی و ای وجود ربانی آنچه مرقوم نمودی و هر چه مشروح فرمودی ملحوظ
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
